channel.title: INtravel
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: American building a brand-new Admirals Club at Chicago's O'Hare amid turf battle with United
item.description: American Airlines is building an all-new Admirals Club lounge at Chicago's O'Hare International Airport (ORD).

item.title: Earn a Companion Pass for up to a year by applying for a new Southwest card
item.description: You can earn a Companion Pass and bonus points with the Southwest Airlines personal credit cards' welcome bonus offers. Here is what you need to know.

item.title: Deal of the day: Fly to Puerto Rico for only 8,000 AAdvantage miles
item.description: Inspired by Bad Bunny's Super Bowl show? Fly to Puerto Rico for 8,000 American Airlines miles from cities like NYC, Boston, Miami and Dallas through f...

item.title: Register now to earn bonus Marriott Bonvoy points and elite night credits
item.description: Here's how you can earn bonus Marriott Bonvoy elite night credits and points this spring.

item.title: These 27 credit cards can get you free checked bags on your next flight
item.description: Get your baggage fees waived by using the right credit card that includes free checked luggage as a benefit.
